subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! I noted the contents of thine epistle and the purpose of thy call… Thou hast asked the detail in relation to the 12th Imam
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذب بنفحات الله قد اطلعت بمضمون الکتاب و عرفت فحوی الخطاب و حمدت
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @the Twelfth Imam; the Qa'im, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
